overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a vehicle driving through a dystopian industrial district at night. The scene features heavy fog, wet reflective asphalt, orange neon lighting, towering smokestacks, and sparse traffic. The camera follows a route through an intersection, passing pedestrians and turning onto a cross-street lined with industrial warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane industrial arterial road with smokestacks ahead

events.description: vehicle slows and stops at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving along wet industrial road toward distant smokestacks, approaching a red traffic light

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke against the foggy night sky
low-rise industrial structure with glowing orange neon trim
rusted metal barrier along the right side of the road
large gantry with directional signs spanning the road
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a wide, wet industrial road at night, approaching a distant intersection. Orange neon lights illuminate the left side while tall smokestacks loom ahead through the fog. The camera moves steadily forward toward a red traffic light, with sparse traffic visible in the distance.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle proceeds through intersection
vehicle passes pedestrian walking on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the green light and passing a pedestrian walking on the right sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in dark clothing, moving in the same direction as the vehicle

entered.detail: tall pole with horizontal traffic signal arm showing green light
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
massive industrial steel structure with orange lights along the top beam

segments.scene_description: The traffic light turns green and the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, crossing over white crosswalk lines. A pedestrian in dark clothing walks along the right sidewalk, moving in the same direction before being passed. The industrial smokestacks shift to the left as the vehicle advances, and a large steel gantry structure becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cross-street with palm trees and warehouses

events.description: vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection onto the cross street
approaching another red traffic light at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right onto a new industrial street and continuing past palm trees and warehouses

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible on the sidewalk after the turn
large warehouse building with illuminated windows and neon accents
large illuminated advertisement screen glowing in the distance
wet road surface curving to the left with reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right onto a cross-street lined with palm trees and industrial warehouses. The large steel gantry moves closer on the right side while the smokestacks remain visible on the left. The road curves gently, revealing a neon billboard in the distance. The vehicle continues through the foggy industrial landscape, approaching another red traffic light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district at night, transitioning from a wide main road into a narrower street lined with warehouses. It begins by driving along wet asphalt toward a distant intersection, where orange neon lights glow against the silhouette of towering smokestacks looming through the haze. As the traffic light turns green, the vehicle proceeds across white crosswalk lines and passes a lone pedestrian on the sidewalk, causing the smokestacks to shift to the left as a massive steel gantry emerges on the right. The scene then shifts as the vehicle turns right onto a cross-street, gliding past palm trees and industrial buildings while the road curves gently toward a distant neon billboard. Finally, the camera continues through the dense fog, moving deeper into the industrial landscape toward another red traffic light.
